payload.description:
Feature: Model frontier cost/accuracy plot
  Scenario: Frontier rows use evaluation accuracy for the y axis
    Given a feedback evaluation result includes Accuracy and Alignment metrics
    When the model frontier result row is built
    Then accuracy_axis is derived from the evaluation Accuracy metric
    And feedback_metrics.alignment still retains AC1 for drilldown

  Scenario: Procedure detail labels frontier y axis as accuracy
    Given a model frontier procedure has completed rows
    When the user views the procedure detail chart
    Then the chart labels the y axis and table column as Accuracy rather than Feedback AC1
payload.title: bug Model frontier chart should plot cost against accuracy metric
